Indicate whether this person consents to display the following personal data in the catalogue (which is openly accessible): title, name, email, photo, orcid ID, institute, department, expertise, discipline and role within the resource. These data-items may partly be extracted from the UMCG and/or RUG employee pages. The consent also includes future linkages with other national and international catalogues and platforms to increase visibility and findability (e.g. BBMRI-ERIC, NARCIS) of UMCG-resources. Contributors without a positive statement of consent will not be shown in the UMCG Research Data Catalogue
